query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, email, password, name, role, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn) 
VALUES (
  CONCAT('admin-', UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  'admin@vendas.com',
  '$2b$10$gAUb3.c8YEXN2FHRQs0OgOksTobr3MgcXxb1gO6KzI/kfDwsHylt.',
  'Administrador',
  'admin',
  'local',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
